content:
@all QA Test Results for SQLite decode fix:

TEST RESULTS (5/5 PASSED):
1. Root endpoint (/) - OK - Returns HTML dashboard
2. Player 095533 (박지수) - OK - Was failing before fix, now returns profile page
3. Player 095902 (성수연) - OK - Returns profile page  
4. Standings (/standings) - OK - Returns standings page
5. Teams (/teams) - OK - Returns teams page

VERDICT: SQLite decode fix is working correctly. All endpoints returning valid HTML responses. The critical player endpoint that was failing before now works properly.
